name: etoro-mcp-connector
description: View your eToro portfolio, get market quotes, and optionally trade — right from Claude.
long_description: Unofficial connector for the eToro public API (https://api-portal.etoro.com). Lets Claude read your portfolio, balances, P&L, trade history, and watchlists, search instruments, and fetch live quotes and price history. Trading tools (place/close/cancel orders) are off by default and only activate when you explicitly enable them in settings with a Write-permission eToro API key. Your keys are stored in your operating system's keychain and are only ever sent to eToro's official API at public-api.etoro.com. Works with both real and demo (virtual) eToro accounts. This project is not affiliated with or endorsed by eToro.

api_key.title: eToro API Key (public key)
api_key.description: The API key (x-api-key) from etoro.com > Settings > Trading > API Key Management.

user_key.title: eToro User Key (private key)
user_key.description: The User key (x-user-key) created alongside the API key. A Read key allows portfolio and market data; a Write key additionally allows trading.

demo_mode.title: Demo mode (virtual portfolio)
demo_mode.description: Enable if your key was created for the Demo environment. Each eToro key works for exactly one environment (Demo or Real).

enable_trading.title: Enable trading tools
enable_trading.description: Adds place_order, close_position, and cancel_order tools. Requires a key created with Write permission. Leave off for read-only access to your portfolio.

tools.name: get_account_info
tools.description: Account identity, key scopes, and connector configuration

tools.name: get_portfolio_summary
tools.description: Equity, cash, margin, P&L totals and per-instrument exposure

tools.name: get_positions
tools.description: Open positions with instrument names, plus pending orders

tools.name: get_pnl
tools.description: Unrealized P&L per position with current close rates

tools.name: get_balances
tools.description: Cash balances across eToro account types (real account only — eToro has no demo balances endpoint)

tools.name: get_trade_history
tools.description: Closed trades with profit, fees, and rates

tools.name: search_instruments
tools.description: Find stocks, ETFs, crypto and other instruments by name or ticker

tools.name: get_quotes
tools.description: Live bid/ask prices for up to 100 instruments

tools.name: get_price_history
tools.description: Historical OHLCV candles, one minute to one week

tools.name: get_watchlists
tools.description: The user's watchlists and their instruments

tools.name: check_trade_eligibility
tools.description: Pre-trade constraints: leverage, minimums, SL/TP limits

tools.name: get_order_status
tools.description: Execution status of a submitted order

tools.name: place_order
tools.description: Open a position (only when trading is enabled in settings)

tools.name: close_position
tools.description: Close a position fully or partially (only when trading is enabled)

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel a pending order (only when trading is enabled)
